title: Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
company: Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates:
Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates!
